blockers: GitHub webhook secret: Set GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET to the value configured in the GitHub App.
GitHub App installation credentials: Set GITHUB_APP_ID, GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY or GITHUB_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH, and GITHUB_INSTALLATION_ID.
External security tools: Enable SEMGREP_ENABLED, CODEQL_ENABLED, and DEPENDENCY_AUDIT_ENABLED after tool installation/workflows exist.

integrations.detail: Used to verify X-Hub-Signature-256 on all GitHub webhooks.
integrations.name: GitHub webhook secret
integrations.next_step: Set GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET to the value configured in the GitHub App.

integrations.detail: Required for installation tokens, branch creation, commits, PRs, comments, labels, checks, and CI log reads.
integrations.name: GitHub App installation credentials
integrations.next_step: Set GITHUB_APP_ID, GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY or GITHUB_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH, and GITHUB_INSTALLATION_ID.

integrations.detail: Required for real GitHub user sessions and repository import from the dashboard.
integrations.name: GitHub OAuth credentials
integrations.next_step: Set GITHUB_CLIENT_ID, GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET, SESSION_SECRET_KEY, GITHUB_OAUTH_CALLBACK_URL, and WEB_APP_URL.

integrations.detail: Local record mode is active; branch and PR operations stay in the database.
integrations.name: GitHub write mode
integrations.next_step: Set GITHUB_WRITES_ENABLED=true only after GitHub App credentials are configured.

integrations.detail: Provider configured as OpenRouter/google/gemma-4-31b-it:free at https://openrouter.ai/api/v1.
integrations.name: LLM model gateway
integrations.next_step: Set MODEL_API_KEY and run provider verification before live planning/code-generation claims.

integrations.detail: Enabled tools: deterministic regex scanner only.
integrations.name: External security tools
integrations.next_step: Enable SEMGREP_ENABLED, CODEQL_ENABLED, and DEPENDENCY_AUDIT_ENABLED after tool installation/workflows exist.

integrations.detail: OpenTelemetry instrumentation is enabled but no OTLP exporter endpoint is configured.
integrations.name: OpenTelemetry export
integrations.next_step: Set OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT for real trace export.

integrations.detail: Required before replacing local header auth with cookie-backed GitHub sessions.
integrations.name: Dashboard session secret
integrations.next_step: Set SESSION_SECRET_KEY to a long random secret.

warnings: GitHub write mode: Local record mode is active; branch and PR operations stay in the database.
OpenTelemetry export: OpenTelemetry instrumentation is enabled but no OTLP exporter endpoint is configured.
